---
title: "video  strategy"
lightbox: true

---
## Series collaboration with the Smithsonian
Co-created, directed and hosted a series featuring objects from the National American History Museum that feature Latin American History.

<!-- Row 1 -->
::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-4}
{{< video videos/20240503_MargaritaFinal.mp4 >}}
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
{{< video videos/20240307_DORA_v2.mp4 >}}

:::

::: {.g-col-4}
{{< video videos/20240816_Paños_final.mp4 >}}
:::
:::

## Tiktok Latino Music Series
Prototyped a series featuring Latino Music takes for alt.Latino Tiktok. Directed alt. Latino Tiktok on best practices for social media.

<!-- Row 2 -->
::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-4}
{{< video videos/victoria.mp4 >}}
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
{{< video videos/farruko.mp4 >}}

:::

::: {.g-col-4}
{{< video videos/molotov.mp4 >}}
:::
:::

## Freelance Videographers Edits
Worked with freelance videographers on editing and directing them on best practices on delivering a social-first video package.

<!-- Row 3 -->
::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-4}
{{< video videos/Violeta_Ukraine_v4.mp4 >}}
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
{{< video videos/UKRAINE-tim.mp4 >}}

:::

::: {.g-col-4}
{{< video videos/roe.mp4 >}}
:::
:::

## improv iPhone takes
<!-- Row 4 -->
::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-6}
{{< video video/Fani_Espanol_High.mp4 >}}
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
{{< video video/FaniRosas_Parte2_L.mp4 >}}
:::
:::

## Horizontal reel
{{< video https://youtu.be/t8KAVCmaxHM >}}
